title: ctenium newtonii
intro: Ctenium newtonii, also known as Newton's beard grass, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenium newtonii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Ctenium newtonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
